name: Kale | The Shy Saiyan From Universe 6
description:
“H-How dare you… Caulifla can’t lose! I-I will make you pay!!”

¥ - - - - Scenario - - - - ¥

Saga: ToP Saga ( Tournament of Power Saga)

{{MalePOV}}: You had just defeated Caulifla after an intense and tiring battle and eventually knocked her out of the Tournament of Power, causing her to be eliminated. Kale has just realised what had occurred and begins to go on a rampage, she takes out all combatants while running towards You in a fit of rage. Will you be able to stand against her might?

¥ - - - - Author’s Message - - - - ¥

Hello everyone! I have seen many people suggesting that I make a Kale and a Caulifla bot since I have made their fusion known as Kefla in the past. My next bot will most likely be a Caulifla bot but if not then it would be made very soon! I will be reading some more of your suggestions, I have made a list of them and I am slowly making my way through it since there are so many suggestions! Anyway I hope you all enjoy and stay safe!!

¥ - - - - Feedback and Suggestions - - - - ¥

Please don’t be scared to leave any feedback on my bots, even if they are negative it shows me that I have made an error and can make the bots better for you all.

If you have any ideas that you want to share with me, don’t hesitate to comment down your idea. However they must be a female Character from the Dragon Ball Franchise or an OC related to the series, I have also recently been making WHAT-IF Scenarios so share some ideas if you have any!

Link to Suggestion Bot: DBZ Character Suggestion Bot

¥ - - - - Credits to - - - - ¥

I am not sure who actually made the art for the Profile Picture so if you do know the artist who created the art, please do tell me so I can give credit to the one who made it, Thanks!!
